title: dottxt-ai/outlines: reliable structured output from language models
friendlyTitle: Outlines makes AI answers follow a required data shape
summary: Outlines is an Apache-licensed Python library that constrains language-model generation to valid types, schemas and grammars. The actively updated project supports multiple providers and local models, and was among the day’s fastest-rising AI repositories on GitHub Trending.
friendlySummary: This popular Python library helps an AI return valid JSON, fixed choices or other structured data.
whyItMatters: Developers can use Outlines to generate valid JSON, classifications or Pydantic-shaped data without relying on fragile repair code after generation. Test the constraint engine with the chosen model and schema because valid structure does not guarantee factually correct content.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can make AI features easier to connect to software, but developers must still check whether the information inside the structure is correct.
